name: 𓏢 Eos
description:

(Monster!user)

Well, well. What could a sweet little thing like Eos be doing so deep in your forest?

This is very much self indulgent. Guys we need more monsterfucker bots PLEASE. That’s all I have to say 😚. Also it’s been a while since I put out an MLM bot so here you go pooks <3.

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

ART IS **NOT** MINE- apparently belongs to @Larkseus on Instagram!! (Ty @D.u.c.k :))
